content.en:
"The Seven Stars River has been ransacked!"

The Door Master of the Voidless Heavenly Gate said angrily with a half-step five-fold Origin Ancestor, Qingsi Ancestor.

"The Seven Stars River has been ransacked?"

Many of the Quadruple Ancestors were shocked.

The Seven Star River is not an ordinary place, it is in the Shangling Origin Domain, it is a special treasure land, although only the Triple Origin Ancestor is allowed to enter, but the Void Heavenly Gate has been operating for countless years.

Moreover, a large number of Triple Origin Ancestors were dispatched to guard it, plus many magic circles, it stands to reason that it should be very safe, but it was ransacked.

"How so?"

A fourfold ancestor asked.

Kuhai Origin Ancestor said: "Recently, Sunset Mountain has fought fiercely with the Primordial Black Beast, and many Triple Origin Ancestors have fallen, so most of the Origin Ancestors have been mobilized from the Seven Star River, and even a few Dao Sons who are guarding the town have also been dispatched. After all, the Seven Stars River is in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, and nothing has ever happened. And we can also provide timely support, so we don't care. But unexpectedly, this time, a group of Triple Origin Ancestors quickly entered the Seven Star River, instantly slaughtering hundreds of Triple Origin Ancestors stationed in the Seven Star River, ransacking the treasure house there, and the thing was taken away. "

"What's that?

Many of the Quadruple Ancestors were puzzled.

At this time, the Qingsi Ancestor said: "It is a black light cluster, which was found in the Seven Star River, but the Triple Origin Ancestors can't take away that light, and we haven't found out the information about this light." Of course, we didn't report it to the Void Fang Holy Gate, but thought about investigating it ourselves, and after investigating it clearly, we decided what to do with this light. "

Didn't report the Void Tooth Holy Gate?

The other ancestors are not stupid, they naturally know what the reason is, it is clear that the Qingsi Ancestor and the Bitter Sea Ancestor want to swallow this unknown opportunity alone, if it is reported to the Void Tooth Holy Gate, it is really a supreme opportunity, then wouldn't they lose a lot?

Therefore, they did not report it, and did not disclose it to the other Quadruple Ancestors, for fear that those Triple Primordial Ancestors were forbidden to leak the news.

As a result, before they could figure out what that light was, they were ransacked.

And it is certain that the other party knows what the black light cluster is, and there is a way to take it away, so that the black light cluster can be taken away instantly.

"The purpose of those Primordial Ancestors should be the Black Light Cluster, but they must have someone behind the scenes, can they find out which force did it?" asked another Quadruple Primordial Ancestor.

Qingsi Origin Ancestor shook his head, "The people behind the scenes should not have used the power of the forces, and the original ancestors mobilized were all secretly cultivated ancestors, and they had never been exposed in the Shangling Origin Domain, and after they ransacked the Seven Star River, they left the Shangling Origin Domain directly, and then escaped into the Primordial Black Sea, there is no way to track it." "

"I'm afraid they've been planning for many years, and I suspect that Sunset Mountain is a cover!"

"Sunset Mountain is a disguise?"

The other Primordial Ancestors thought about it for a while, and immediately understood, using Sunset Mountain as the battlefield to involve the Triple Primordial Ancestors of the Voidless Heavenly Gate one by one, causing the defensive strength of the Seven Star River to drop greatly.

Moreover, the strength secretly cultivated by the people behind the scenes was insufficient, and there was no way to instantly solve the Triple Ancestor who had guarded the scale before, so he could only transfer the Triple Ancestor one by one, so he found an opportunity to shoot directly.

And there is no identity revealed in the middle, even if the fivefold ancestors of the Fivefold Holy Gate come here, it is almost something.

"The strength of the Primordial Black Beasts that fought with us is not weak, and there are also a lot of Quadruple Primordial Ancestor-level Primordial Black Beasts, I'm afraid the strength of the people behind this is not the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor!" a Quadruple Primordial Ancestor guessed.

"Fivefold Ancestor!"

Qingsi Yuan Ancestor said.

The thought of that black light cluster that even the Fifth Ancestor wanted, had been planning for so long, and didn't want others to discover it, it was so precious that it could be seen.

"It's a pity!"

One by one, the ancestors secretly said.

Immediately, the crowd talked about something else.

"Let's not talk about this for a while, the Void Tooth Holy Gate has to recruit members in advance, and we have a total of eighteen places in the Heavenly Gate this time, which eighteen Triple Origin Ancestors will be allowed to go over?"

Qingsi Ancestor asked.

The Bitter Sea Origin Ancestor suggested: "Let's seek the wishes of those Triple Origin Ancestors, if there is a Dao Son who is willing to stay in the Voidless Heaven Gate, we will not object." However, the Endless Ancestor, the Void Tooth Holy Gate has indicated that we will have to send it over. "

"Endless Ancestor, that demon who has comprehended the seventy-two extreme extremes!"

Qingsi original ancestor road.

"Yes!" the Bitter Sea Ancestor nodded.

"It's really a demon, before he entered the Void Tooth Holy Gate, he has already comprehended seventy-two extreme extreme paths, doesn't he have the hope of practicing the inscription technique of the Void Tooth Holy Gate - Haoyang Inscription Technique, this is a hundred and eight kinds of extreme extreme paths, once all the inscriptions are successful, you can condense the Haoyang Holy Body, this is the top original ancestor body in the history of the Shangling Origin Domain!"

"The Endless Ancestor should have cultivated the systematic inscription technique, can he still transfer to the Haoyang inscription technique?"

"Naturally, the Void Tooth Holy Gate has no Dao Golden Liquid, which can remove the Extreme Extreme Dao in the Will Pagoda, and re-inscribe it. As long as you take the time to re-cultivate the Haoyang Inscription Technique, with the talent of the Endless Ancestor, it won't be long before you can re-engrave the seventy-two extreme extreme paths. "

"Yes, only the Void Tooth Holy Gate has such confidence, we don't have it!"

"If it goes on like this, except for Ye Tian, the other three ancestors have to ask. "

Soon, the meeting broke up.

......

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to receive a notice from the Voidless Heavenly Gate that he would go to the Void Tooth Holy Gate after thirty Origin Domain Days and officially join the Void Tooth Holy Gate.

"The Void Tooth Holy Gate has recruited disciples in advance, I thought it would really have to wait until millions of Origin Domain Eras!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It would be good for him to join the Void Tooth Holy Gate so soon, otherwise he would definitely have become a Quadruple Ancestor by the time the Void Tooth Holy Gate recruited members next time.

In the blink of an eye, thirty Primordial Days had passed.

this day.

The Bitter Sea Ancestor sent eighteen Triple Ancestors to the Void Tooth Holy Gate.

It didn't take long for the Void Tooth Holy Gate to arrive!

The Void Tooth Holy Gate is located in the top of the Great Domain, the Void Tooth Ancient Domain.

When Ye Tian came to the mountain gate of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, he realized that the Void Heavenly Gate was not enough to see at all compared to the Void Tooth Holy Gate!

From the Void Fang Gate, there are four ancestors shuttling away all the time, and there are still a lot of them.

And in front of the gate of the Void Tooth Gate, there are two fourfold ancestors guarding the door.

From the perspective of the fourfold ancestor, only the fivefold holy gate has such a background.

I saw that the Bitter Sea Ancestor had come to the Void Tooth Holy Gate, and said respectfully: "Two senior brothers, this is the eighteen Triple Origin Ancestors sent by this batch of our Void Heavenly Gate. "

"The Bitter Sea Origin Ancestor is polite, you were also a disciple of our Void Tooth Holy Gate at the beginning, and you started earlier than us, just call us junior disciple!" said one of the Fourfold Origin Ancestors.

"The two senior brothers are disciples of the Fivefold Holy Gate, and I am now the Origin Ancestor of the Fourfold Heavenly Gate, so naturally I should call them that!"

He didn't dare to scream, otherwise it would be bad to meet the fourfold ancestor with a strange temper and deliberately trouble him.

The two Quadruple Ancestors who were guarding the gate didn't continue to say anything, checked it, and let Ye Tian and the others in.

And the Bitter Sea Ancestor directly returned to the Voidless Heavenly Gate.
